title: 第 17 課｜彈性碰撞：質心系裡只轉方向｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
彈性碰撞如何同時滿足動量與動能守恆？本課從質心系觀察等大反向的動量向量如何只改變方向，再轉回實驗室系，並導出靜止靶粒子能取得的最大能量比例 4m₁m₂/(m₁+m₂)²。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 17 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 17 | Elastic Collisions in the Centre-of-Mass Frame | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
How does an elastic collision conserve both momentum and kinetic energy? This lesson shows why equal and opposite centre-of-mass momenta only rotate, transforms the result back to the laboratory, and derives the maximum energy-transfer fraction 4m₁m₂/(m₁+m₂)² for a target initially at rest.

Lesson 17 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
